name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Understand how AI systems work, from basic concepts to modern language models

concepts.name: What Is AI?
concepts.description: Artificial intelligence as pattern recognition from data. What AI can and cannot do today.

concepts.name: Machine Learning Basics
concepts.description: Learning from examples instead of explicit rules. Training data, models, and predictions.

concepts.name: Supervised Learning
concepts.description: Learning from labeled examples. Classification (cat vs dog) and regression (predicting a number).

concepts.name: Unsupervised Learning
concepts.description: Finding patterns without labels. Clustering, dimensionality reduction, and anomaly detection.

concepts.name: Neural Networks
concepts.description: Layers of interconnected nodes that transform inputs into outputs. Weights, biases, and activation functions.

concepts.name: Training a Model
concepts.description: Loss functions, gradient descent, and backpropagation — how a neural network learns from its mistakes.

concepts.name: Large Language Models
concepts.description: How models like GPT and Claude work: tokenization, attention, and next-token prediction at scale.

concepts.name: Prompt Engineering
concepts.description: Crafting effective prompts. System prompts, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought, and common pitfalls.

concepts.name: AI Ethics & Bias
concepts.description: How biased training data leads to biased outputs. Fairness, transparency, and responsible deployment.

concepts.name: AI Agents
concepts.description: Autonomous systems that observe, plan, and act. Tool use, multi-step reasoning, and human oversight.
